## 🛠️ Pull Request Description
Provide a clear description of the changes made and which issue it solves.

## 📜 Checklist Before Submitting
- [ ] My code follows the **Conventional Commits** standard (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.).
- [ ] I used hifens (`-`) instead of asterisks (`*`) for semantic lists in docs.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally on my machine.
- [ ] If you are part of the internal team, ensure the CTO (`lucsaml`) approved this task.

## 🚨 Related Issues
Closes # (Type the issue number here, e.g., #12)
